channel.title: Self-Driving Cars on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Driving Cars on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Tesla Autopilot Crash in Texas: Autonomy, Safety, and Legal Fallout
item.description: A Tesla Model 3 with Autopilot engaged crashed into a Texas home, killing a woman. Authorities confirm the driver was using automated driving assistance. The incident raises questions about AV safety and Tesla's regulatory compliance.

item.title: Robotaxis Invade Closed Highways: A Tech Disaster?
item.description: Waymo's robotaxis drove into closed highways 13 times. Dive into the tech failures, safety risks, and what this means for autonomous vehicles.
